trending_videos.title: RESIDENT EVIL – Official Teaser Trailer (4K)
trending_videos.description:
𝙰 𝚗𝚎𝚠 𝚎𝚛𝚊 𝚘𝚏 𝚎𝚟𝚒𝚕.
 
From the mind of Zach Cregger, director of Weapons and Barbarian. Watch the new teaser trailer for Resident Evil. Filmed for IMAX – in theatres 9.18. 

https://www.instagram.com/residentevil/
https://twitter.com/ResidentEvil
https://www.facebook.com/ResidentEvilMovie
https://www.tiktok.com/@resident.evil.movie

From the mind of visionary filmmaker Zach Cregger (Weapons, Barbarian) comes a thrilling — and terrifying — reinvention of the Resident Evil franchise. In an all-new story, Resident Evil follows Bryan (Austin Abrams), a medical courier who unwittingly finds himself in an action-packed, non-stop race for survival as one fateful, horrifying night collapses around him in chaos.
 
From Columbia Pictures and Constantin Film, in association with TriStar Pictures, Resident Evil hits theatres September 18, 2026.

Directed by: Zach Cregger   
 
Written by: Zach Cregger & Shay Hatten    

Produced by:
Robert Kulzer
Zach Cregger
Roy Lee
Miri Yoon
Carter Swan
Asad Qizil

trending_videos.title: Buffalo Sabres at Boston Bruins
trending_videos.description: Boston and Buffalo continue their best-of-seven series in Game 6 at TD Garden. Boston won Game 5, while Buffalo leads the series 3-2. Jeremy Swayman made 26 saves, including a key pad stop. David Pastrnak scored to stave off the Bruins' elimination.

trending_videos.title: Zach Cregger's Resident Evil - Trailer Reaction
trending_videos.description: My reaction to the first teaser for Zach Creagger's Resident Evil. Let's hope it's good!

trending_videos.title: Tampa Bay Lightning at Montreal Canadiens
trending_videos.description: The Lightning and the Canadiens continue their series in Game 6 at Bell Centre. Montreal leads 3-2 after a Game 5 win. Brendan Gallagher opened the scoring for Montreal while rookie Jakub Dobes stopped 38 of 40 shots in the 3-2 Game 5 victory.

trending_videos.title: Marty, Life Is Short | Official Trailer | Netflix
trending_videos.description:
The definitive documentary on beloved comedian Martin Short, using beautiful, intimate, never-before-seen archive.

Watch on Netflix: https://www.netflix.com/title/82128115

About Netflix:
Netflix is one of the world’s leading entertainment services offering TV series, films, games and live programming across a wide variety of genres and languages. Members can play, pause and resume watching as much as they want, anytime, anywhere, and can change their plans at any time. 

Marty, Life Is Short | Official Trailer | Netflix
https://www.youtube.com/@Netflix

trending_videos.title: Gutfeld!
trending_videos.description: Greg Gutfeld looks at the news of the day through a satiric lens fused with pop culture and features his takes on the day's headlines.

trending_videos.title: Subnautica 2 Early Access Cinematic Trailer
trending_videos.description:
Subnautica 2 is an underwater survival adventure game set on an all-new alien world. It is the next chapter in the Subnautica universe, developed by Unknown Worlds.

Driven from your home by ongoing conflict, Alterra offers you the chance at a new life. But as the colony ship CICADA shepherds you and your fellow Pioneers to your new home, something goes awry. The ship’s AI insists that your mission should continue. Stranded and faced with near-insurmountable odds, you must do everything in your power to survive. The future of humanity on this world is in your hands.

Subnautica 2 enters Early Access on May 14th, 2026, at 08:00 PDT / 15:00 UTC. 

✨ Wishlist Subnautica 2 Now ✨

Steam: https://store.steampowered.com/app/1962700/Subnautica_2/
Epic: https://store.epicgames.com/p/subnautica-2-d27f94
Xbox: https://www.xbox.com/en-US/games/store/subnautica-2/9PJPCB188SVG

🐟 Join the Community 🐟

Discord: https://discord.gg/subnautica
X: https://twitter.com/Subnautica
TikTok: https://www.tiktok

trending_videos.title: Cadillac Championship, Second Round
trending_videos.description: The second round of the PGA Tour signature event continues at Trump National Doral in Miami. The field enjoys a no-cut format, meaning all competitors play the weekend and remain in contention for the staggering $3.6 million first-place check.

trending_videos.title: Evan Fong - mailman
trending_videos.description:
we’re out of time 
Stream full album: https://evanfong.lnk.to/speed
Stream mailman: https://evanfong.lnk.to/mailman

Director of Photography - Logan Wildermuth
Directed by - Darren fucking Craig and ya boy
Retard direction: Sea 
Crafts services: Lester Green
Editor: Mushu 
Dead body: Prasad Romijn

Lyrics:

Hey little boy pack your bags
Don’t be late for the big day 
You are becoming who you are 

This one’s a stud he gets it done 
No one will stand in his way 
You are running out of time 

Boots as sharp as his wit
Yeah, he must have his way 
Hid the corpse in the wall 
Ain’t no time like today 

In too deep, never quit 
Superstar resume 
Do or die for the cause 
Ain’t no time like today 

Mailman 
Look at the size of that fat 
Waist band 
Okay hey father what’s the
Game plan 
Should I listen to the
Mailman 
So one day I’ll be grand 

Sticks and drums meat is gone
Spread those wings and open gates 
Yeah, stay driven
don’t fall asleep at the wheel

Don’t hold a grudge like his sons
Hea

trending_videos.title: Boston Celtics at Philadelphia 76ers
trending_videos.description: The Celtics play the 76ers at Xfinity Mobile Arena for Game 6 of the Eastern Conference first round. Philadelphia won Game 5, while Boston leads the series 3-2. Joel Embiid dominated the paint and added 33 points to the final score of 113-97.

videos_without_transcripts.title: Boston Celtics at Philadelphia 76ers
videos_without_transcripts.description: The Celtics play the 76ers at Xfinity Mobile Arena for Game 6 of the Eastern Conference first round. Philadelphia won Game 5, while Boston leads the series 3-2. Joel Embiid dominated the paint and added 33 points to the final score of 113-97.

insights.evidence: Two of the 10 videos are trailers (RESIDENT EVIL – Official Teaser Trailer (4K), Marty, Life Is Short | Official Trailer | Netflix)
insights.actionable_insight: Consider creating content around upcoming movie releases or exclusive trailer reactions to capture audience interest.

insights.evidence: Three of the 10 videos are sports-related (Buffalo Sabres at Boston Bruins, Tampa Bay Lightning at Montreal Canadiens, Boston Celtics at Philadelphia 76ers)
insights.actionable_insight: Develop content that provides analysis, recaps, or highlight reels of sporting events to engage sports fans.

insights.trend: Diverse categories with lack of dominant theme
insights.evidence: The presence of varied content types such as gaming (Subnautica 2 Early Access Cinematic Trailer) and commentary (Gutfeld!)
insights.actionable_insight: Explore niche markets within each category to identify underserved audiences and tailor content to their preferences.

multi-category_presence.observation: Top channels like Sony Pictures Entertainment and Netflix contribute to trending content, indicating strong brand influence across entertainment.
multi-category_presence.actionable_insight: Collaborate with well-established channels for cross-promotional opportunities or feature their content to leverage their large audiences.

individual creators.observation: Individual creators such as The Critical Drinker maintain relevance through commentary.
individual creators.actionable_insight: Encourage individual creators to engage with trending topics or provide unique perspectives to boost visibility.

emerging_trends.evidence: The presence of both traditional media and new media formats suggests an opportunity to blend these styles.
emerging_trends.actionable_insight: Experiment with hybrid content formats that combine traditional storytelling with interactive or live elements.

audience_engagement.evidence: High view count relative to the number of videos indicates strong engagement.
audience_engagement.actionable_insight: Produce content with high replay value or interactive elements to maximize viewer retention and increase watch time.

analysis.note: Transcript analysis is more detailed, metadata analysis provides broader trends
